caption: The main menu's new "All-Teams Control" option: a real two-army battle (both lines spawn as normal) where the player commands BOTH sides directly -- team 1's AI never runs (Battle.all_teams_control, previously only reachable from demo/test scripting). Team 0's line (top) is box-selected and marched forward first; team 1's line (bottom) -- which a normal battle leaves to the AI -- is then box-selected and marched forward too, proving control isn't restricted to one side.
